description_long: This is an adult female figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly extended to the sides. She is dressed in a fitted, sleeveless one-piece garment that covers her torso and upper thighs, paired with high-heeled, strappy shoes. Her hair is styled neatly in a bun at the back of her head, exposing her neck and facial features. The figure's skin is smooth and unblemished, and her posture is balanced and symmetrical. The overall appearance is clean and modern, suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or shopping districts. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A standing adult female figure in a fitted one-piece garment and high-heeled shoes, with hair styled in a bun. The posture is upright and balanced, with arms slightly extended.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the full front of the one-piece garment, with arms and legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the side of the torso, and the high-heeled shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the bun hairstyle, the back of the garment, and the backs of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the face, side of the torso, and the high-heeled shoes.
